channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [平台底座] Mistral Voxtral TTS Running On-Device via MLX on Apple Devices

item.title: [2] [大V/权威] Mistral releases a new open source model for speech generation
item.description:
📊 Score: 136 | Category: 大V/权威

✨ Why selected:

📄 Summary: The model, which lets enterprises build voice agents for sales and customer engagement, puts Mistral in direct competition with the likes of ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and OpenAI....

item.title: [9] [行业动态] You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
item.description:
📊 Score: 90 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini....

item.title: [10] [行业动态] Cohere launches an open source voice model specifically for transcription
item.description:
📊 Score: 80 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Relatively light at just 2 billion parameters, the model is meant for use with consumer-grade GPUs for those who want to self-host it. It currently supports 14 languages....
